request.prompt: Solo upright piano, slow tempo around 60 BPM, a single suspended chord blooming and resolving across twelve seconds. Hushed, intimate, warm room tone. Cinematic minimalist score, A24 sensibility. No drums, no strings, no synths — solo piano only. Ends on a resolved major chord with gentle fade.
